---
title: "what is a DHCPack why and how did I get it?"
date: 2007-10-22
forum: Absolute Beginner Talk
---

### Post by vanjejo on 2007-10-22
I had been forced into the .net system with microsoft... and had an awful time.
I am new to this sytem and have so many hits on my firewall - like 30-40 within minutes. 
I checked the log and am not sure if this is normal for a brand new start-up ? 
Sorry - long log but it is not ALL!
